items.title: Strong 7.5 earthquake hits off Japan, tsunami warning issued
items.summary: A 7.5 magnitide earthquake struck northern Japan on Monday triggering tsunami warnings in the region, Japan's Meteorological Agency said. The tremor was strong enough to shake large buildings as far as Tokyo, hundreds of kilometres away.

items.title: Bulgaria's Kremlin-friendly former president Radev wins parliamentary election
items.summary: Bulgaria's former president and pro-Russian candidate Rumen Radev on Monday won a parliamentary majority in the country's elections according to near-complete results. Radev – an EU critic who has called for renewing ties with Russia – hailed a "victory of hope".

items.title: 'Unprecedented since 1999': Radev secures absolute majority with reformist and eurosceptic coalition
items.summary: Following the victory of Rumen Radev in Bulgaria's election, Alison Sargent is pleased to welcome Dr. Petia Gueorguieva, Political Science Researcher and Lecturer at the New Bulgarian University. According to Dr. Gueorguieva, there are broader implications for Bulgaria: political instability, economic pressures, and geopolitical positioning. While Bulgaria remains anchored within the European Union and NATO, she suggests Radev successfully consolidated a highly heterogeneous electorate, uniting

items.title: French prosecutors summon Elon Musk over sexualised AI deepfakes on X
items.summary: French prosecutors on Monday summoned tech billionaire Elon Musk for a voluntary interview over allegations that the AI feature Grok disseminated millions of sexualised deepfakes on his X social media platform. It is unclear whether Musk will attend the interview.

items.title: Ligue 1: Title race tightens as Lyon win away at Paris Saint-Germain
items.summary: Paris Saint-Germain lost (2-1) to Lyon and now see Lens closing in on them at the top of the Ligue 1 table. Lyon can still hope to qualify directly for the Champions League.

items.title: Pope Leo XIV recalls 'great suffering' at historic slave trade shrine in Angola
items.summary: Pope Leo XIV visited a historic Angolan shrine once tied to the trans-Atlantic slave trade on Sunday, recalling the “sorrow and great suffering” endured by generations of Africans. His remarks come amid renewed scrutiny of the Catholic Church’s historical role in slavery and colonial-era doctrine.

items.title: Middle East war live: No plan for a second round of negotiations with the US, says Iran's FM
items.summary: Iran's foreign ministry spokesperson said Monday that there were no plans for a second round of negotiations with the US for now, adding that it has shown it is "not serious" about pursuing the diplomatic process, committed "aggressive acts" and violated ceasefire provisions. The statement came after the Israeli army ​warned ​residents in southern Lebanon not to ​move ‌south ⁠of a specified line ‌of villages or approach ⁠areas near the Litani River. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

items.title: Bulgaria's pro-Russian former president takes strong lead
items.summary: Bulgaria’s ex-president Rumen Radev is on course to win a parliamentary election, according to exit polls,  but may fall short of a governing majority. His Progressive Bulgaria coalition leads with, in a vote marked by low turnout and deep political instability, the country’s eighth election in five years. Radev warns another vote would be “a disaster,” as Bulgaria grapples with corruption, fragmentation, and its EU-Russia balancing act. Jean-Emile Jammine speaks with Renne Traicova, Managing bo

items.title: Ukrainian best-selling author, Andrey Kurkov speaks to France 24
items.summary: Andrey Kurkov is Ukraine's most prominent living novelist and one of the country's leading public intellectuals. Since Russia's full-scale invasion in 2022, he has remained in Kyiv and published three volumes of war diaries (Diary of an Invasion, The Year of the Locust, and Three Years on Fire). Speaking to Jean-Emile Jammine, he describes what it means to be a writer living under the bombs.

items.title: Locating Shakespeare's £140 London flat
items.summary: The precise location of the house that William Shakespeare bought in London has been discovered thanks to evidence unearthed by British academic Professor Lucy Munro, who’s pinpointed the exact location and layout of a property the Bard bought for £140 back in 1613, three years before he died. She tells us more in this edition of Spotlight.

items.title: Dicko en bronze, l'OL relance la course au titre, Wemby au top : les infos sport du week-end
items.summary: La judokate française Romane Dicko, qui visait un sixième titre continental, a dû se contenter du bronze aux Championnats d'Europe. Lyon s'est imposé 2-1 sur la pelouse du Paris SG pour grimper sur le podium, infligeant un 5e revers en Ligue 1 au leader parisien, talonné par Lens. Quant à Victor Wembanyama, il a inscrit 35 points pour le premier match de play-offs de sa carrière en NBA.

translation.title: Dicko in bronze, OL re-launchs title race, Wemby top: weekend sports info
translation.summary: French judokate Romane Dicko, who was aiming for a sixth continental title, had to settle for bronze at the European Championships. Lyon won 2-1 on the Paris SG lawn to climb on the podium, putting a fifth setback in Ligue 1 to the Parisian leader, who was heeled by Lens. Victor Wembanyama scored 35 points for the first play-off game in his NBA career.

items.title: Alerte tsunami au Japon après un séisme de magnitude 7,4 dans le nord du pays
items.summary: Un violent séisme de magnitude 7,4 a frappé lundi le nord du Japon, a indiqué l'Agence météorologique japonaise (JMA). Elle a émis dans la foulée une alerte au tsunami, prévoyant des vagues pouvant atteindre trois mètres. Deux premières vagues de 70, puis 80 centimètres ont frappé le littoral.

translation.title: Tsunami alert in Japan after magnitude earthquake 7.4 in northern Japan
translation.summary: A violent earthquake of magnitude 7.4 struck northern Japan on Monday, according to the Japanese Meteorological Agency (JMA). It issued a tsunami warning, providing waves of up to three metres. Two first 70-centimetre waves hit the shoreline.

items.title: Bulgarie : l'ex-président prorusse Roumen Radev remporte les législatives
items.summary: L'ex-président bulgare Roumen Radev, qui appelle à renouer le dialogue avec la Russie, a remporté la majorité au Parlement, selon des résultats électoraux quasi définitifs publiés lundi. Ce dénouement pourrait mettre fin à l'instabilité politique dans le pays, après huit scrutins en cinq ans.

translation.title: Bulgaria: Former pro-Russian President Roumen Radev wins legislative elections
translation.summary: Former Bulgarian President Roumen Radev, who calls for renewed dialogue with Russia, won the majority in Parliament, according to quasi-final election results published on Monday. This outcome could put an end to political instability in the country after eight elections in five years.

items.title: Ligue 1 : en battant Paris, Lyon relance la course au titre et à l'Europe
items.summary: Le Paris Saint-Germain s'est incliné face à Lyon (2-1) et voit Lens se rapprocher. Lyon peut encore espérer se qualifier directement pour la Ligue des champions.

translation.title: Ligue 1 : by beating Paris, Lyon revives the title race and Europe
translation.summary: Paris Saint-Germain bowed to Lyon (2-1) and saw Lens getting closer. Lyon can still hope to qualify directly for the Champions League.

items.title: La Corée du Nord a testé des missiles, une menace pour son voisin sud-coréen
items.summary: La Corée du Nord a annoncé lundi avoir testé des missiles balistiques tactiques équipés d'ogives à sous-munitions. Ce type d'arme menace en premier lieu la Corée du Sud et les militaires américains qui y sont stationnés, selon les analystes.

translation.title: North Korea tested missiles, a threat to its South Korean neighbour
translation.summary: North Korea announced on Monday that it had tested tactical ballistic missiles equipped with cluster warheads. This type of weapon primarily threatens South Korea and the US military stationed there, according to analysts.

items.title: Dans la tourmente de l'affaire Mandelson Epstein, Keir Starmer face aux députés britanniques
items.summary: Le Premier ministre britannique Keir Starmer se présente lundi devant le Parlement, pour tenter d'apaiser la colère déclenchée par un nouvel épisode dans l'affaire Peter Mandelson. Ce haut membre du Parti travailliste avait été nomméambassadeur aux États-Unis malgré ses liens avec Jeffrey Epstein.

translation.title: In the turmoil of the Mandelson Epstein case, Keir Starmer faced British MPs
translation.summary: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer presents himself Monday before Parliament to try to ease the anger triggered by a new episode in the Peter Mandelson affair. This high-ranking Labour Party member had been appointed ambassador to the United States despite his ties with Jeffrey Epstein.

items.title: La dissuasion nucléaire au cœur de la rencontre entre Tusk et Macron en Pologne
items.summary: Les dirigeants pro-européens Emmanuel Macron et Donald Tusk vont s'attacher, lundi, à Gdansk, en Pologne, à renforcer la coopération franco-polonaise pour une Europe plus "forte" et plus "souveraine" face à la Russie et aux États-Unis. Au menu, notamment : dissuasion nucléaire, satellites militaires ou encore industrie de défense.

translation.title: Nuclear deterrence at the heart of the meeting between Tusk and Macron in Poland
translation.summary: Pro-European leaders Emmanuel Macron and Donald Tusk will work on Monday in Gdansk, Poland, to strengthen Franco-Polish cooperation for a stronger and more "sovereign" Europe against Russia and the United States. On the menu: nuclear deterrence, military satellites or defence industry.

items.title: Elon Musk convoqué par la justice française dans le cadre de son enquête sur les dérives de X
items.summary: Le milliardaire Elon Musk doit être entendu en audition libre par le parquet de Paris, lundi, dans le cadre de l'enquête française "sur les éventuelles violations par la plateforme X de la législation française", notamment les deepfakes sexuels. Rien n'indique si Elon Musk va s'y présenter ou non, mais ce dernier a dénoncé "une attaque politique".

translation.title: Elon Musk summoned by the French courts as part of his investigation into the abuses of X
translation.summary: Billionaire Elon Musk must be heard in a free hearing by the Paris Public Prosecutor's Office on Monday in the context of the French investigation "on possible violations by platform X of French legislation", in particular sex deepfakes. There is no indication of whether or not Elon Musk will be present, but the latter has denounced "a political attack".

items.title: La marine américaine a pris le contrôle d'un cargo iranien, doutes autour des négociations
items.summary: Alors que le cessez-le-feu entamé le 8 avril doit s'achever mercredi, Donald Trump annonce qu'un cargo iranien a tenté de franchir "le blocus naval", dimanche. Le Touska a alors été intercepté par la marine américaine, qui a pris le contrôle du navire. Cet événement intervient alors que les pourparlers doivent reprendre à Islamabad lundi, mais Téhéran ne compte pas y participer, selon la télévision d'État.

translation.title: US Navy took control of Iranian cargo, doubts about negotiations
translation.summary: While the cease-fire that began on 8 April is due to end on Wednesday, Donald Trump announces that an Iranian cargo ship has tried to cross the "ship blockade" on Sunday. The Touska was then intercepted by the United States Navy, which took control of the ship. This event comes at a time when talks are scheduled to resume in Islamabad on Monday, but Tehran does not intend to participate, according to state television.

items.title: L'élection de Roumen Radev accueillie de manière "plus sereine" que prévu par l'Europe
items.summary: Certains en Europe pouvaient craindre, après la défaite de Viktor Orban en Hongrie, de le voir être remplacé dans le clan des euro-sceptiques par Roumen Radev - qui remporte les législatives bulgares. Mais ce pro-russe a déjà promis qu'il ne mettrait pas de veto contre le 20e train de sanctions contre la Russie ou le prêt destiné à l'Ukraine. "Il ne menace pas totalement le fonctionnement de l'UE, contrairement à Viktor Orban", rapporte Pierre Benazet, correspondant pour France 24 à Bruxelles.

translation.title: The election of Roumen Radev welcomed in a "more serene" manner than foreseen by Europe
translation.summary: Some in Europe might fear, after Viktor Orban's defeat in Hungary, that he would be replaced in the Eurosceptic clan by Roumen Radev - who won the Bulgarian legislatures. But this pro-Russian has already promised that he will not veto the 20th package of sanctions against Russia or the loan to Ukraine. "It does not completely threaten the functioning of the EU, unlike Viktor Orban," reports Pierre Benazet, correspondent for France 24 in Brussels.

items.summary: 大美中国，江山如画。 党的十八大以来，习近平总书记的考察足迹遍及神州大地。祁连山麓、坝上林海，秦岭深处、黄河之滨，总书记在大江奔涌处谋划千秋大计，在山川锦绣间擘画生态蓝图。一系列重要论述，为新时代生态文明建设提供了根本遵循和行动指南。  世界环境日到来之际，我们跟随习近平总书记的脚步，一起呵护山水、寄情山水，领悟守护绿水青山、建设生态文明之道。  江河为脉 心系长江之变，习近平总书记前往沿江重镇，考察长江经济带发展。从三峡库区到洞庭湖畔，从港口码头到企业车间，总书记深入调研，作出一系列重要指示，为新时代江河保护治理提供了重要遵循。  2018年4月，习近平总书记来到湖南岳阳城陵矶水文站考察。在狭窄的站房外长廊上，习近平总书记举目远眺。“共抓大保护，不搞大开发”的战略定力，在这里化作守护一江碧水的坚定行动。  2023年10月10日下午，习近平总书记在江西九江市考察，冒雨在江边察看，了解当地长江国家文化公园建设、长江岸线生态修复等情况。10月12日，总书记在进一步推动长江经济带高质量发展座谈会上回顾长江经济带发展历程，感慨：“做就要做好，坚定做下去。笃行不怠，一以贯之，久久为功。” 黄河

items.title: 学习手记 | “环境就是民生”
items.summary: 6月5日是世界环境日，也是我国环境保护法确立的环境日。 22年前的这一天，在时任浙江省委书记习近平部署推动下，以农村人居环境整治为重点的“千万工程”启动。 当时，习近平同志担任浙江省委书记刚半年多，工作千头万绪。他何以将农村人居环境整治作为重点工作？ 在基层调研时，习近平同志发现，在浙江经济快速发展的同时，广大农村却面临“成长的烦恼”，村庄面貌不如人意。 全省3.4万个村庄中，人居环境较好的仅4000个。有人形容：“走过一村又一村，村村都是垃圾村。”还有农民这样描述：“起早贪黑赚钞票，垃圾堆里数钞票，躺在医院花钞票。”可以说，人居环境整治是当时浙江农村群众的一个迫切期盼。 “千万工程”聚焦乡亲们走什么村道、怎么处理畜禽粪便等小问题，却直接关系农民获得感、幸福感，是实打实的民生大事。 老百姓的生活环境如何，习近平同志念兹在兹： 上世纪70年代，在陕北冯家坪公社赵家河大队驻点时，他撸起袖管，一石一瓦盖起村里第一个男女分开的厕所； 到正定工作，不仅大力推进“人拉猪吃”的“连茅圈”改造工作，还拿着大扫帚走上街头搞卫生，推动成立全县第一支专职卫生清洁队； 任福州市委书记，亲自为建造垃圾处理场选址

items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 6月5日，国家副主席韩正在北京会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团。 韩正表示，中美关系是当今世界最重要的双边关系之一。当前，中美关系处于关键历史节点。中美相互尊重、和平共处、合作共赢，不仅有利于两国，也有利于世界和平与发展。希望中美高级别二轨对话能不断汇聚两国有识之士的真知灼见，增进美国各界对中国的了解和理解，共同推动中美关系稳定、健康、可持续发展。 美方表示，美中高级别二轨对话有助于双方更好理解对方，为两国关系发展提供更多有益思路。中国经济发展令人钦佩，双方应加强贸易、投资等领域对话合作。

translation.summary: On 5 June, the Vice-President of Xinhua, Han, met in Beijing with the United States delegation to the High-Level Second Track Dialogue between China and the United States. Han is saying that relations between China and the United States are among the most important bilateral relations in today ' s world. Currently, relations between China and the United States are at a critical historical point. Mutual respect and peaceful coexistence between China and the United States, as well as cooperation and win-winness, are beneficial not only to both countries but also to world peace and development. items.title: 中央军委主席习近平签署命令 发布《军事设施建设条例》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 中央军委主席习近平日前签署命令，发布《军事设施建设条例》，自2025年8月1日起施行。 条例深入贯彻习近平强军思想，深入贯彻新时代军事战略方针，聚焦服务备战打仗，适应新的领导指挥体制和保障模式，科学规范军事设施建设的基本原则、管理体制、运行机制和工作制度，是军事设施建设工作的重要依据。 条例共11章63条，按照军委管总、战区主战、军种主建的总原则，围绕理顺建设链、管理链、监督链，重点从军事设施建设计划管理、项目审批、工程发包、勘察设计、施工管理、应急建设、安全保密、监督问责等方面，厘清管理权限，优化流程机制，固化实践成果，为提高军事设施建设质量效益和保障能力提供有力法治保障。

items.title: 中共中央办公厅印发《党组讨论和决定党员处分事项工作程序规定》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电　近日，中共中央办公厅印发《党组讨论和决定党员处分事项工作程序规定》，并发出通知，要求各地区各部门认真遵照执行。 　　《党组讨论和决定党员处分事项工作程序规定》全文如下。 　　党组讨论和决定党员处分事项工作程序规定 　　（2018年11月29日中共中央批准　2018年11月29日中共中央办公厅发布　2025年5月26日中共中央修订　2025年5月26日中共中央办公厅发布） 　　第一条　为了规范党组讨论和决定党员处分事项，根据《中国共产党党组工作条例》、《中国共产党处分违纪党员批准权限和程序规定》，制定本规定。 　　第二条　坚持用改革精神和严的标准管党治党，落实党组（含党组性质党委，下同）全面从严治党主体责任，强化纪检监察机关派驻机构（以下简称派驻机构）监督职责，始终以严的基调、严的措施、严的氛围纵深推进正风肃纪反腐。 　　第三条　对党组管理的人员中的党员实施党纪处分，党组、纪委监委派出的纪检监察工委（以下简称派出机构）、派驻机构等应当按照规定权限和程序履行职责，加强协调沟通，有序顺畅衔接，形成工作合力，实现政治效果、纪法效果和社会效果有机统一。 　　第四条　党组讨论

translation.title: The Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party issued the Working Procedures Provisions for the Discussion and Decision of Party Members by Party Groups
translation.summary: In recent days, the Central Office of the Communist Party of China (CPC) published the Rules of Procedure for Discussion and Decision on Matters concerning the Punishment of Members of the Party by the Party Group, and issued a circular requiring the regional departments to comply with them in good faith. The text of the Working Procedures Provisions for the Discussion and Decision of Members of the Party Groups is reproduced below. Article 1 of the Working Procedures of the Party Groups for the Discussion and Decision of Matters Concerning the Punishment of Members of the Party (approved by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 29 November 2018 and issued by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 26 May 2025) Article 2 - To maintain a spirit of reform and strict standards in the governance of the Party, to implement the overall responsibility of the Party ' s constituent groups (including the Party Committee, together with its members), to exercise full control over the principals of the Party, to strengthen the oversight role of the Office of the Ombudsman (hereinafter referred to as the accredited body) and to promote discipline and corruption with a strict tone, strict measures and strict atmosphere. Article 3 imposes party disciplinary measures on members of the party ' s group management, and the inspection and inspection committee (hereinafter referred to as the sentinel agency) appointed by the party group, the disciplinary committee and the accredited body, among others, shall carry out their duties in accordance with the established terms of reference and procedures, enhance coordination and communication, establish an orderly and smooth line of communication, and work together to achieve political, disciplinary and social coherence. items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy conservation law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher-quality and better-quality energy efficiency efforts, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to gain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection was carried out through a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which were to be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi and Sichuan, as well as by the Standing Committee of the People ' s Congress of Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a universal nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot checks and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving work in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving activities; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with legislation; other issues in law enforcement; and suggestions and recommendations for amendments to energy-saving laws.
